data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
select sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no) as memname ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no) as member_group_no
,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no)) as member_group_name
,sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position.description ,nvl(sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long,'ไม่ได้ระบุ') position_long
,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date ,trunc(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth,sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date)/12) as age , pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as age_1
,sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.max_loan_permit ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.mem_request_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_installment_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount
,sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_share , sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name ,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_age( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date) as agetext_member
, sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_share_value , sc_lon_m_loan_request.monthdep ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.monthshare ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.monthloan ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.other_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.interest_first ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.fee_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date,'MONTH') as begin_month_thai
,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc ,sc_mem_m_member_address.telephone ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share
,sc_lon_m_loan_request.bank_code ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.bank_acc_no ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name , sc_mem_m_member_work_info.group_position ,'' as norm_authen
,'' as norm_level_salary
/*หนี้สามัญ ยกเว้น หนี้รับโอนฐานะผู้ค้ำ*/ ,nvl( ( select sum( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance - sc_lon_m_loan_card.pending_amount ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card ,sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ( 'รอ','รท' ) ), 0 ) as norm_all_balance
/*หนี้รับโอนฐานะผู้ค้ำ*/ ,nvl( ( select sum( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance - sc_lon_m_loan_card.pending_amount ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card ,sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type in ( 'รอ','รท' ) ), 0 ) as loan_coll
/*หนี้สามัญบุคคลค้ำ*/ ,nvl( ( select sum( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance - sc_lon_m_loan_card.pending_amount ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card ,sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ( 'ทพ','สพ','รอ','รท') ) , 0 ) as norm_balance
,nvl( ( select sum( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance - sc_lon_m_loan_card.pending_amount ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card ,sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_rule.atm_status <> '1' ) , 0 ) as emer_balance
,nvl( ( select sum( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance- sc_lon_m_loan_card.pending_amount ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card ,sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_rule.atm_status = '1' ) , 0 ) as od_balance
,nvl( ( select sum( sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_approve_amount ) from sc_lon_m_loan_history, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_rule.atm_status = '1' ) , 0 ) od_old_approve
, (select pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(pka_srv_datetime.fp_RelativeMonth(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,12)) from sc_lon_m_loan_history , sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_atm_lon_card where sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no =sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_atm_lon_card.loan_contract_no =sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no
) as begin_dt
,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.period_recrieve
,sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.telephone from sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj , sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position , sc_mem_m_member_work_info ,sc_cnt_m_coop ,sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type ,sc_mem_m_member_address ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where 1 = 2
